subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath believed in God, the Single One, the All-Informed. Verily thou wast present in the Most Great Prison and didst hearken unto the Call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن آمن بالله الفرد الخبیر انک حضرت فی السجن الاعظم و سمعت ندآء
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
